rag_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations like `0.0 -> pre(t) + step`
Guard previous-value comparisons with an initialized boolean flag
generic_rules: Place component type assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
Use AGREE logical operators (`and`, `or`, `not`, `=>`) for contract expressions
Declare helper equations for complex expressions to improve readability and reuse
Ensure all visible identifiers are properly typed and declared before use
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for contract clauses
Use `eq name : type = expression;` for helper declarations
Use `const name : type = value;` for named constants in contracts
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions without proper typed exposure
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
